scores.notes: Excellent response. Uses event.workload, add_layer with combine=True, container.replan(), self.config, relation.data[relation.app] pattern. Adds can_connect() guard and defers - valid ops pattern. Uses ops.pebble.Layer() constructor instead of raw dict - also valid. HTTP health check with url field is correct. on-check-failure with restart is correct. Extra details (can_connect, status updates, port config, helper method) are all correct ops patterns, not hallucinations. The relation.data.get(relation.app) vs relation.data[relation.app] is a subtle difference but both work. Level 'alive' vs 'ready' is a minor difference from gold standard but both are valid pebble check levels.
